nodes.name: 几内亚
nodes.summary: 几内亚是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联98种鸟类，包括白腹珍珠雞、White-throated francolin、Ahanta spurfowl等98种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: West African pied hornbill
nodes.summary: The West African pied hornbill (Lophoceros semifasciatus) is a bird of the hornbill family, a family of tropical near-passerine birds found in the Old World. The West African pied hornbill is found in West Africa, from south Nigeria to Senegal and Gambia—primarily in secondary forest areas of the Guinean-Congolese forest, and is threatened by forest fragmentation. It was previously considered conspecific with the Congo pied hornbill, and was split in IOC 13.2. It is a frugivore. References Further reading Birds of The Gambia by Barlow, Wacher and Disley, ISBN 1-873403-32-1

links.label: 分布于

The West African pied hornbill is found in West Africa, from south Nigeria to Senegal and Gambia—primarily in secondary forest areas of the Guinean-Congolese forest, and is threatened by forest fragmentation. It was previously considered conspecific with the Congo pied hornbill, and was split in IOC 13.2. It is a frugivore.{{Cite journal |last1=Chaves |first1=Patrícia P
